projectDescription: A powerful, programmable hypertextual information management system for GNU Emacs, providing smart hyperbuttons, a hierarchical outliner, contact manager, wiki note-taking, and window control.
keyFeatures: Smart Keys (Action Key & Assist Key) that perform context-sensitive operations across all Emacs modes
Explicit and implicit hyperbuttons that activate URLs, file paths, grep output, git commits, and more
HyWiki: markup-free personal wiki with automatic WikiWord hyperlinking using Org mode
Koutliner: multi-level autonumbered hierarchical outliner with permanent hyperlink anchors
HyRolo: hierarchical contact manager and fast full-text record search system
HyControl: interactive window and frame sizing, moving, and management with single keystrokes
Global buttons accessible anywhere across a user's network of documents
Programmable button types written in Emacs Lisp for custom hypertext behaviors
publicApiSurface: hyperbole-mode — Global minor mode to enable/disable all Hyperbole features
hbut:activate — Activate a Hyperbole button at point
hact — Execute a Hyperbole action type
defib — Define a new implicit button type
defact — Define a new action type
hyrolo-fgrep — Fast grep search across HyRolo files
hyrolo-grep — Regexp search across HyRolo files
hywiki-mode — Global minor mode for HyWiki word highlighting
kotl-mode — Major mode for Koutliner documents
hui:ebut-create — Interactively create an explicit button
hmouse-install — Install Smart Key mouse bindings
